EMElevateMindStudio
Home Workspace Terms

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Overview

ElevateMindStudio is a private social media operations platform used to plan, draft, review, approve, schedule, publish, and monitor content for owned brand accounts and managed campaigns.

Information we process

We may process account information, workspace settings, brand source material, draft content, approval records, publishing metadata, connector status, and operational logs needed to run the service.

Connected platforms

When you connect third-party services such as Buffer, YouTube, LinkedIn, Discord, Meta, or similar platforms, we use authorized access only for the workspace features you enable. Tokens and secrets are stored outside the public repository and are not displayed in the product UI.

How we use information

We use information to operate the workspace, generate drafts, validate channel readiness, support approvals, queue approved publishing actions, monitor integration health, prevent misuse, and maintain security.

AI processing

ElevateMindStudio may use AI providers to generate or transform draft content from approved sources and campaign instructions. Human review remains part of the workflow before publishing is enabled.

Data sharing

We do not sell personal data. We share information only with service providers required to operate the platform, with connected platforms you authorize, or when legally required.

Security

We use operational safeguards to separate public code from secrets, restrict publishing behavior during setup, and keep connector status visible before real posting actions are enabled.

Contact

Questions about privacy can be sent to support@elevatemindstudio.net.
